name: demoblaze-cypress-automation
description: Automated E2E testing for DemoBlaze using Cypress with Allure reporting

scripts.test:all:report: npm run clean:reports && cypress run && npm run allure:serve
scripts.clean:reports: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['allure-results', 'allure-report'].forEach(d => fs.rmSync(d, {recursive: true, force: true}))"
scripts.clean:videos: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('cypress/videos', {recursive: true, force: true})"
scripts.clean:screenshots: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('cypress/screenshots', {recursive: true, force: true})"

author: CYPRESS_EXPERT_AGENT
